title: Splat Climber Scene Annotations
description: Grip points and start pose for a climbing simulator session. Exported after in-scene authoring; optional on import.

version.description: Schema version. Increment on breaking changes.

collision.description: Snapshot of the voxel grid this file was authored against. Used to validate grip indices on import.

voxelResolution.description: Meters per voxel edge. Must match scene.voxel.json.

meta.description: Optional authoring metadata. Ignored by runtime.

splatHint.description: Original splat filename, not used for loading.

voxelHint.description: Original voxel JSON filename, not used for loading.

voxel.description: Integer grid indices [ix, iy, iz] into the collision octree. Origin is collision.gridBounds.min.

normal.description: Outward face normal (unit vector, PlayCanvas space). Hand orientation at this grip.

offset.description: World-space offset in meters from the voxel cell center. Usually zero.

label.description: Optional display name, e.g. "crux", "starting right hand".

pelvis.description: Root body position in world meters (PlayCanvas space).

facing.description: Horizontal look direction (unit vector, Y component typically 0). Pelvis yaw derived from this.

limbs.description: Maps each limb to a grip id. Omitted limbs hang free.
